metadata.description: L2 engines SSOT built from planner runtime pattern + location/planner-status contract.
metadata.scope: L2 engines only (group_by=3/4), planner-driven, no L2->L1 feedback
metadata.source: planner transitions parity + approved MultiBOM location rules

architecture: L2 engines (planner parity + strict location/planner status gates, no inactive, no reserve)

invariant_principles.claim: No L2->L1 feedback: engine contour never modifies planner state/triggers.
No inactive for engines: state=1 is forbidden.
No reserve for engines in L2 contract matrix.
Location cannot change while planner is in ops or in final repair stage (ActiveTrigger=1), except forced terminal detach.

location_contract.rule: If planner_status==2 OR (planner_status==4 AND planner_active_trigger==1), location changes are forbidden.
location_contract.exception: Forced detach is allowed only when (ll > 0 AND sne >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr >= br).

location_contract.rule: On planner enter to repair, all engines on this planner must set aircraft_number=0.
When planner enters ops or ActiveTrigger=1, enforce full kit through quota demand and assignment.
Planner enter ops => installed engines move to state=2; planner exit ops => installed engines move from state=2 to state=3.
State=7 is allowed on-wing (aircraft_number != 0) as non-removable holding while location is locked.

rtc_execution_order.notes: Apply location guards based on planner status.
4->3 only for day0 cohort; runtime repair exit to 2.

rules.notes: Dynamic spawn is allowed any day to close deficit.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND aircraft_number != 0 AND planner_status != 2

rules.notes: Planner exits ops -> installed engines move to serviceable.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND (oh > 0 AND ppr >= oh) AND NOT ((ll > 0 AND sne >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr >= br)) AND NOT (planner_status == 2 OR (planner_status == 4 AND planner_active_trigger == 1))
group_by in {3,4} AND (oh > 0 AND ppr >= oh) AND NOT ((ll > 0 AND sne >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr >= br)) AND (planner_status == 2 OR (planner_status == 4 AND planner_active_trigger == 1))

rules.notes: When location is locked, engine cannot be detached to repair and moves to on-wing unserviceable.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND ((ll > 0 AND sne >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr >= br))
group_by in {3,4} AND aircraft_number != 0 AND planner_status == 2

rules.notes: Installed serviceable engine joins ops only when planner is in ops.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND planner_status == 2 AND aircraft_number != 0 AND intent_state == 2

rules.notes: Return from on-wing unserviceable to operations under planner and intent gates.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND day0_state(psn) == 4 AND repair_days >= repair_time

rules.notes: 4->3 is allowed only for day0 repair cohort.

pre.expr: group_by in {3,4} AND day0_state(psn) != 4 AND repair_days >= repair_time AND planner_status == 2

rules.notes: Runtime repair exit must go to operations path.
